title: Understanding Blockchain Forks
description: A flowchart illustrating the two main types of blockchain forks (soft and hard) and their resulting outcomes on the network.
relationships: Original Blockchain leads to Consensus Rule Change
Consensus Rule Change splits into Backwards-Compatible and Non-Backwards-Compatible paths
Backwards-Compatible path leads to Temporary Fork
Temporary Fork leads back to Original Blockchain
Non-Backwards-Compatible path leads to Permanent Split
